snippet.title: Apekz - Tuldok
snippet.description:
Produced by @thisisneroph 

Intro 

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

Inakyat ko mataas na bundok
Di tumigil kahit mga paa ko mabugbog
kung kelan nakatungtong sa tuktok
Saka naman nagkaroon ng tuldok x2


Verse

Maraming nagaabang maraming nagtatanong
Kelan battle miss ka na namin mang baon
Bago ko sagutin kung bakit ba ganon
Ibalik muna natin sa dating panahon

Estranghero at Ramon, Yawzi at Pajutes
Datu vs Loonie eto snappy na salute
Hanggang sa maligaw kay eminem pati kay juice
Binge watch ng grind time pagka galing ko ng school

Rekta na kagad sa computer shop
Panahong di pa uso yung google maps 
Sina soundtrip yung freestyle ni supernat
Ako’y nahuli ng rap parang na-booby trap

Hanggang sa mapanuod yung cameltoe versus datu
Brand new ginanap sa quantum
Acapella parang dumbfoundead vs tantrum
Tagalog pa kaya yung dating ay naging times two

Tiningnan ko kung facebook sila
Gusto ko na malaman kung meant to be ba
Di lang na simple na asaran parang beh bote nga
Inisip lang yung legacy may a to z pa

2010 kalaban ko si harlem ty
 B A T T L E R A P
Komedyante na rapper parang michael v.
Nagapi nung unang salang pero ays lang gee

Ako ay og parang obe wan kenobi
Unang tf ko nun kay daddy joe d.
Five hundred pesos yung inabot kay toti
Pasimple lowkey palihim parang shinobi

Unang laban ko disisyete anyos
Nung natalo winning streak na pagkatapos
Pano pa pag yung degree ay nairaos
Rap ang pinili pinagisipan ng maayos

Pagbaba ng barko walang ng doubt
Nilaban ko kagad si bryan lao
Imbis na mag tiktik kalawang mamili ng weak na kalaban
Ang gusto ko peak na agad bakbakan sa south

Nababad ng husto lalong pinahusay
Isang dos por dos tatlong isabuhay
Naihanay ako sa mga tunay
Yung bata na nag solo flight dun sa malugay

Dumaan ang pandemya handa pa rin gumera
Kaso ba’t may hurado na nagpapalitan ng pera
Nag iba yung sistema walang tinatalo
Di na ata to yung liga na kilala ko

Fast forward twenty twenty two
Laban ko kay Sinio ready execute
Yung lugar sobrang grimey pwede mv shoot
Binuhos ko walang natira miski na residue

Dahil sa pustahan yung career ang tinaya ko
Ayoko lang yung sining natin parang ginagago
Galit yung ibang tao  
Pero may resibo, meron video garapalan na hindi na tinatago

“Yari ka pati yung presidente binangga mo”
Alam kong pwedeng kahinatnan ng ginawa ko
Buti kahit papano meron pinagbago
At di totoo na matagal ko na yun pinaplano

“Kung meron kang problema dapat kinausap mo”
Malapit na yung battle nung nadagdag yun sa sulat ko
Ipapaalam ko pa ba yun kay Anygma
Battle emcee din sya ulo pa ng liga

Yung pagkatalo raw kay gorio ay dinadamdam
di nakuha kampeonato na inaasam
liga ay sinasaktan tanginang pustahan yan
dahil sa utang na loob hinahayaan lang 

Yung pusta isang milyon alam kong talo na’ko
Dagdag mo pa gawain nung mga hurado
Tensionado, emosyon, pressure halo-halo
Kaya sa entablado nagmukha akong barumbado

Lumipas ang tatlong taon
Siguro nawala yung mga tampo ngayon
Fliptop anniversary nag ayang pumunta don
Para magpakumbaba at masabi ko yung rason

Walang driver si loons kaya di nakasabay
Sumama ako kay zaki sa grab ay sumakay
Kahit di imbitado pumunta pasaway
Para personal mag sorry at makipagkamay

Bumili ng sariling alak at ng mangunguya
Para di masabi na ang kapal naman ng mukha
Nandun din lahat ng pasimple na nangungutya
Pero balewala gold label yung tinutungga

Hinintay ko siya baka lang natraffic
Pati si loons wala pa ba yan naman awit
Tinawag ng bantay si anygma daw nagalit
At ang sabi sakin pinapaalis ka ni aric

Ang sabi ko ganon ba di nako nagtanong pa
Sana lang hinarap nya ko gusto ko mangamusta
Kahit di na bigyan ng laban ay wala kong pake
Basta matapos yung gabi na maayos kami

Kaso eto na yung ending ni tanga 
Pero ang bait ni kuya dennis talaga
Ba’t kapa pumunta eh ekis ka na nga
Diyos nga nagpapatawad ay atheist ka pala

Tinanggap ko kahit na masakit
At least malinaw na di na ako makakabalik
Namiss ko yung yanig, pagod at stress
Lam kong maraming sabik kay battousaipekz

But i guess this is the end
Di na kailangan icallout sa big event
Hinihiling kasi pag bumanat hindi bitin
Pag FT alam mong hindi titipirin kalaban titirisin

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

snippet.title: Character Trailer - "Varka: The Code of Chivalry" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Varka
snippet.description:
Is it the spirit of chivalry that shapes a knight's visage, or does the person who claims the mantle carve the likeness of their station?
Varka will not linger over this question for long. The free wind never tarries, and neither does his carefree nature.

Singer: Michael Yu

Lyrics for "The Script - The Man Who Can't Be Moved"

[Verse 1]
Going back to the corner where I first saw you
Gonna camp in my sleeping bag, I'm not gonna move
Got some words on cardboard, got your picture in my hand
Saying, "If you see this girl, can you tell her where I am?"
Some try to hand me money, they don't understand
I'm not broke, I'm just a broken-hearted man
I know it makes no sense, what else can I do?
And how can I move on when I'm still in love with you?

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street
So I'm not moving
I'm not moving
[Verse 2]
Policeman says, "Son, you can't stay here"
I say, "There's someone I'm waiting for
If it's a day, a month, a year"
Gotta stand my ground, even if it rains or snows
If she changes her mind, this is the first place she will go

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street
So I'm not moving
I'm not moving
I'm not moving
I'm not moving

[Bridge]
People talk about the guy who's waiting on a girl, oh
There are no holes in his shoes, but a big hole in his world, mmm
And maybe I'll get famous as the man who can't be moved
And maybe you won't mean to, but you'll see me on the news
And you'll come running to the corner 'cause you know it's just for you
I'm the man who can't be moved
I'm the man who can't be moved

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me (find you're missing me)
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be (oh, where on Earth I could be)
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet (to the place that we'd meet, oh, oh)
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street (on the corner of the street)
So I'm not moving

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me (I'm not moving)
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be (I'm not moving)
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet (I'm not moving)
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street

[Outro]
Going back to the corner
Where I first saw you
Gonna camp in my sleeping bag
I'm not gonna move

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] Girl Rules กฎหลัก...ห้ามรักเธอ
snippet.description:
เรื่องราวความวุ่นวายของความสัมพันธ์ในกลุ่มแซฟฟิก ที่เริ่มต้นจากการกลับมาของ “แบมบี้” (ฟิล์ม รชานันท์) แฟนเก่าของ “ปริม” (น้ำตาล ทิพนารี) ที่เข้ามาในฐานะลูกค้าของบริษัททำโฆษณาที่ปริม และ “มิน” (วิว เบญญาภา) เปิดร่วมกัน โดยมีสไตลิสต์สาวรุ่นน้องของปริมอย่าง “กอหญ้า” (เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์) และนางแบบสาวสวยมากเสน่ห์อย่าง “ชาช่า” (มิ้ลค์ พรรษา) รวมถึงตากล้องสาวประจำบาร์ที่มินชอบไปอย่าง “แพรว” (มิ้ม รัตนวดี) เข้ามาร่วมโปรเจกต์ด้วย ติดตามความสัมพันธ์วุ่นวายของกลุ่มสาวแซฟฟิกที่จะมาทำให้คุณได้รู้ว่ากฎของความรักบางอย่างมันก็ต้องทำตาม ไม่งั้นจะเจอกับเรื่องวุ่นวายใจเหมือนกับแก๊งนี้ ใน “GIRL RULES กฎหลัก…ห้ามรักเธอ” ทุกวันจันทร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 และดูออนไลน์ เวลา 21:30 น. บนแอป iQIYI และเว็บ iQ.com ที่เดียวเท่านั้น เริ่ม 9 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ทิชากร ภูเขาทอง 

รายชื่อนักแสดง
น้ำตาล ทิพนารี วีรวัฒโนดม  รับบท  ปริม 
ฟิล์ม รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์  รับบท  แบมบี้
มิ้ลค์ พรรษา วอสเบียน  รับบท  ชาช่า
เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์ ลิ้มปติยากร  รับบท  กอหญ้า
วิว เบญญาภา จีนประสม  รับบท  มิน
มิ้ม รัตนวดี วงค์ทอง   รับบท  แพรว
ไซซี รัตท์ริชา ประภากิติ  รับบท  แอรี่
ยู่ยี่ อลิสา อินทุสมิต   รับบท  ญานิน
มิ้น มิณฑิตา วัฒนกุล   รับบท  เจ๊แอ๊น

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!

Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress

- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan

- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

snippet.title: Toy Story 5 | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 19
snippet.description:
Times may change but friends are forever
#ToyStory5 is only in theaters June 19

An all-new trailer and poster for Disney and Pixar’s highly anticipated upcoming animated adventure “Toy Story 5” debut today. The toys are back and this time, Buzz Lightyear, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they come face-to-face with Lilypad (voice of Greta Lee), a brand-new tablet device that arrives with her own disruptive ideas about what is best for their kid, Bonnie. Will playtime ever be the same?
 
The trailer also teases the anticipated reunion of Woody and Buzz following Woody’s decision to leave the gang and start helping lost toys at the end of 2019’s “Toy Story 4.” As the toys face the tech devices of today, it’s going to be all hands on deck with some familiar and all-new characters.
 
Several actors have joined the incredible roster of voice talent including Craig Robinson as Atlas, a cheerful talking GPS hippo toy; Shelby Rabara as the excitable camera toy Snappy; Scarlett Spears as the sweet and shy 8-year-old Bonnie; Mykal-Michelle Harris as Blaze, an independent 8-year-old girl who loves animals; and Matty Matheson as the tech-fearing toy Dr. Nutcase.
 
Also rounding out the voice cast are John Ratzenberger as the wisecracking piggybank Hamm; Wallace Shawn as Rex, the anxiety-riddled tyrannosaurus rex toy; Blake Clark as the ever-loyal Slinky Dog; Jeff Bergman as the sarcastic Mr. Potato Head; Anna Vocino as the nurturing Mrs. Potato Head; Annie Potts as the adventure-loving Bo Peep; Bonnie Hunt as the wise rag-doll Dolly; Melissa Villaseñor as Karen Beverly, Bonnie’s homemade toy fashioned out of a plastic knife; John Hopkins as the dignified hedgehog plush toy Mr. Pricklepants; Kristen Schaal as the plastic triceratops toy Trixie; Ernie Hudson as the action figure Combat Carl; and Keanu Reeves as Canadian daredevil toy Duke Caboom.
 
The previously announced voice cast includes Tom Hanks (Woody), Tim Allen (Buzz Lightyear), Joan Cusack (Jessie), Greta Lee (Lilypad), Conan O’Brien (Smarty Pants) and Tony Hale (Forky).
 
“Toy Story 5” is directed by Academy Award® winner Andrew Stanton (“WALL•E,” “Finding Nemo,” “Finding Dory”), co-directed by Kenna Harris (“Ciao Alberto”), produced by Lindsey Collins (“Turning Red,” “WALL•E,” “Finding Dory”), and features an original score by Academy Award® winner Randy Newman who returns to score his fifth “Toy Story” feature. The film releases exclusively in theaters nationwide on June 19, 2026. 
 
ABOUT PIXAR:
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

snippet.title: The Mummy Returns - Official 25th Anniversary Trailer (2026) Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz
snippet.description:
Check out The Mummy Returns 25th anniversary trailer for the upcoming theatrical re-release of the sequel to the 1999 action film, The Mummy. The Mummy Returns stars Brendan Fraser (as Rick O’Connell) and Rachel Weisz (as Evelyn). 

Set 10 years after the events of the first film, The Mummy Returns picks up in 1933 with the swashbuckling heroes now married and living in London. Parents to eight-year-old Alex (Freddie Boath), the couple brings the boy along to their Egyptian expeditions, where they inadvertently uncover a rare artifact, the Bracelet of Anubis. The piece once belonged to a fearsome warrior known as the Scorpion King (Dwayne Johnson in his feature film debut) and can be used to command his army of jackal-like fighters. 

Back in London, trouble begins after the bracelet locks onto Alex’s wrist, just as a cult planning to resurrect the powerful mummy Imhotep (Arnold Vosloo), kidnaps Evelyn. Suddenly, father and son are forced to undertake a dangerous rescue mission alongside Evelyn’s spoiled brother (John Hannah), one that pits them against Meela Nais (Patricia Velasquez). The physical reincarnation of Imhotep’s ancient lover, she hopes Imhotep will defeat the Scorpion King in battle, thereby conquering the world.

Dodging all manner of unimaginable threats—death-defying chases, merciless hand-to-hand combat, even ritual sacrifice—the O’Connell family bravely fights to save the globe, and one another, from certain destruction.

The Mummy Returns, directed by Stephen Sommers, returns to US theaters on March 27, 2026 for a very special limited engagement.

#TheMummyReturns #Movies #IGN

Back in London, trouble begins after the bracelet locks onto Alex’s wrist, just as a cult planning to resurrect the powerful mummy Imhotep (Arnold Vosloo), kidnaps Evelyn. Suddenly, father and son are forced to undertake a dangerous rescue mission alongside Evelyn’s spoiled brother (John Hannah), one that pits them against Meela Nais (Patricia Velasquez). The physical reincarnation of Imhotep’s ancient lover, she hopes Imhotep will defeat the Scorpion King in battle, thereby conquering the world.

Dodging all manner of unimaginable threats—death-defying chases, merciless hand-to-hand combat, even ritual sacrifice—the O’Connell family bravely fights to save the globe, and one another, from certain destruction.

The Mummy Returns, directed by Stephen Sommers, returns to US theaters on March 27, 2026 for a very special limited engagement.

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

snippet.title: Restless Heart - When She Cries (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Restless Heart - When She Cries (Lyrics)

Follow Restless Heart:
https://www.facebook.com/RestlessHeartOfficial
https://open.spotify.com/artist/0FcmRWJUfnCuwoXE1H2b0H?si=po5AX1w7T3-Dz7cJ9zvugA

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
The road I have traveled on
Is paved with good intentions
It's littered with broken dreams
That never quite came true

[Verse 2]
When all of my hopes were dyin'
Her love kept me tryin'
But she does her best to hide
The pain that she's been through

[Chorus]
When she cries at night
And she doesn't think that I can hear her
She tries to hide
All the fears she feels inside
So I pray this time
I can be the man that she deserves
'Cause I die a little each time
When she cries

[Verse 3]
She's always been there for me
Whenever I've fallen
When nobody else believes
She'll be there by my side

[Verse 4]
I don't know how she takes it
Just once, I'd like to make it
Then there'll be tears of joy
That fill her lovin' eyes

[Chorus]
When she cries at night
And she doesn't think that I can hear her
She tries to hide
All the fear she feels inside
So I pray this time
I can be the man that she deserves
'Cause I die a little each time
When she cries

[Chorus]
So I pray this time
I can be the man that she deserves
'Cause I die a little each time
When she cries
